property.name: templateDeveloperName
property.label: Template Developer Name
property.description: DeveloperName of the CrafterPdfTemplate__mdt record to use for branding.

property.name: reportId
property.label: Report ID
property.description: 15 or 18-character ID of the Salesforce report to export.

property.name: saveToFiles
property.label: Save to Salesforce Files
property.description: When enabled, the generated PDF is saved as a ContentVersion.

property.name: linkedRecordId
property.label: Linked Record ID
property.description: Optional. Links the saved ContentVersion to this SObject record.
